company: medac Gesellschaft für klinische Spezialpräparate mbH
title: Event Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Event Management / BWL / Brand Management Studium
matched_skills: Event planning & delivery (HSBC hybrid town halls 300+ attendees, Moli Media 4,000+ attendees)
Vendor & partner management (KOL coordination, agency/supplier negotiation)
Budget management & cost tracking (HSBC USD 8M programme, financial variance reporting)
Trade fair / Messe operations (GRG, Intelligent Power — exhibition booth, live demos)
missing_skills: German fließend — CV shows B1+, fließend typically implies B2/C1
Dedicated agency management experience in event context (partial match from vendor coordination)
core_responsibilities: Planung, Organisation und operative Durchführung von Events (intern + extern)
Abstimmung mit internationalen Tochtergesellschaften zu länderspezifischen Compliance-Vorgaben
Auswahl und Steuerung von Agenturen und Messeunternehmen inkl. Vertragsmanagement
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: hybrid town hall events (300+ attendees) — directly maps to event planning, speaker management, on-site ops
Moli Media: 4,000+ attendee corporate events, KOL/vendor coordination — demonstrates large-scale delivery
GRG + IPC: trade fair / Messe presence, exhibition management — maps to Messebauer-Steuerung
HSBC: budget tracking USD 8M, variance reporting — maps to budget monitoring and settlement
Highlight cross-cultural coordination (EMEA, Asia backgrounds) for international subsidiary alignment
Frame German as actively improving (B1+) and English C1 as primary working language strength
